scope_note: Goal Kicker currently exports testing-policy summaries for this school. If official score distributions were not captured, the panel stays policy-only rather than inventing ranges.
policy: Northwestern is test-optional for first-year and transfer applicants and does not require ACT or SAT scores; if students submit scores, there is no preference between the SAT and ACT.

claims.claim: Northwestern is test-optional for first-year and transfer applicants and does not require ACT or SAT scores; if students submit scores, there is no preference between the SAT and ACT.
